title: Evans, Graham -  Government Whip in the House of Lords - ACOBA advice
body: "Lord Evans left his role as a Government Whip in July 2024.  Chair, Greater Cheshire Development Forum, for Low Associates Ltd  Lord Evans sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Low Associates. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2025; and the appointment was taken up in September 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
